title: Heidorn - AI-Powered Medical Scribing
problem: Doctors spend significant time on documentation. Medical scribing is expensive and not scalable for most clinics.
solution: AI-powered ambient scribing that listens to patient consultations and automatically generates structured clinical notes in Swedish.
target_customer: Primary care clinics, specialist clinics, hospitals
traction_signals: Focus on Swedish language medical scribing
regulatory_notes: Medical documentation tool, data privacy compliance.
varden_fit: Moderate — documentation tool for clinics. Could be valuable add-on for Varden clinic partners.
notes: Swedish competitor to US scribing tools like Nuance DAX.
